no-restricted-globals.name: document
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/logic must not touch the DOM. Move this to the UI tier.

no-restricted-globals.name: window
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/logic must be portable — no window references.

no-restricted-globals.name: localStorage
no-restricted-globals.message: Persistence happens in the UI tier; logic returns state, UI persists it.

no-restricted-globals.name: sessionStorage
no-restricted-globals.message: Persistence happens in the UI tier; logic returns state, UI persists it.

no-restricted-globals.name: navigator
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/logic must be portable — no navigator.

no-restricted-globals.name: location
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/logic must be portable — no location.

no-restricted-globals.name: alert
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/logic returns events; UI decides whether to show a dialog.

no-restricted-globals.name: confirm
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/logic returns events; UI decides whether to show a dialog.

no-restricted-globals.name: prompt
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/logic returns events; UI decides whether to show a dialog.

no-restricted-globals.name: Notification
no-restricted-globals.message: packages/logic returns events; UI decides whether to notify.

paths.name: i18next
paths.message: packages/logic must not translate strings. Return translation keys / event payloads; UI translates.

patterns.message: packages/logic must not import from a UI tier — direction is UI -> logic only.
